title: Rescue Elaria from the Elf King
description: Long-term personal quest to become strong enough to challenge the Elf Kingdom and free Elaria from her oath-bound captivity.

rewards.description: Reuniting the family, freeing Elaria, and changing the balance of power between humans and demi-humans.

title: Escort Lyriel to the Guardian
description: Life-binding quest where Blue must bring Lyriel to the Guardian of the Tree of Life within nine years of their contract.

rewards.description: Audience with the planetary Guardian, deeper understanding of the Tree of Life and the world's true systems.

title: Clear Cave Crawlers (Guild Request)
description: Guild request to thin cave crawler population at the Cave of Spilled Crystals entrance layer.
